title: SAFARI-CHROME_BOOKMARK-TAB_EXPORT
content:
SAFARI-CHROME_BOOKMARK-TAB_EXPORT


⸻

[AA01] SAFARI (iOS 18.5)

A. Export Bookmarks

Method 1: Use iCloud Sync + Mac
1. Ensure Safari is enabled in iCloud on iPhone:
Settings > Apple ID > iCloud > Safari > ON
2. On a Mac signed into the same iCloud account:
Open Safari → File > Export Bookmarks...
Save .html file to desktop or cloud.

Method 2: Third-Party App
• Use apps like iMazing or AnyTrans to extract Safari data from iOS directly.
• These allow .html or .json bookmark exports.

B. Export Open Tabs (Manual Only)

Safari on iOS does not offer direct export of open tabs. Options:
